Marcos, we love your firm. Here is our offer: if you join our network this year, we will share our cross-border deals.
That sounds promising. But the terms matter. What if we also include a joint training program for both teams?
I like that idea. If your team completes the training, we will give you our valuation models too.
That works for us. I am afraid the first-year fee is too high, though. Can we meet in the middle?
We can make a concession. If you sign this week, we will cut the fee in half for the first year.
That is a fair compromise. If you put it in writing, I will take it to my board today.
Wonderful. So, do we have a deal?
We have a deal. This is a strong commitment, and it gives both firms real leverage. Welcome to the partnership.
What if we include a training program?
I am afraid that wont work. Can we meet in the middle?
That is a fair compromise. We have a deal.
This partnership gives us real leverage.

Hi Marcos, this is Diana from Northbridge Valuation in Toronto. I am calling about our partnership proposal. We really like your firm, and we want to move forward. Here is our offer: if you join our international network this year, we will give you full access to our cross-border deals. If your team completes the joint training, we will share our valuation models too. We are flexible on the terms. If you need more time to review, we can meet in the middle and start with a small pilot project. We believe this is a fair deal for both sides, and we are ready to make a strong commitment. Please review the terms and call me back. If we agree this week, we will sign before the end of the month. I look forward to building something great together. Talk soon.

Let me summarize the agreement we reached today. After a long negotiation, both sides made a few concessions, and I am happy with the result. First, if we deliver the pilot project on time, Northbridge will open their full network to us next year. Second, we agreed on the financial terms: a fair split, with a small fee in the first year only. Third, if either side wants to leave, they will give ninety days notice. We did not get everything we wanted, but we found a good compromise. This partnership gives us real leverage in the international market. It is a strong, long-term commitment, and I believe it is a great deal for our firm. Tomorrow, I will send the final terms to the board for approval.
